TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Haiduan Nsgan Haiduan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 892.99 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 817.5 km², dxgal pmblxan o 74.18 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,278, sapah o 1,090, seejiq tnpusu 4,032 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 94%(Bunung). Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Haiduan o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 15. 15 o, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ħaiduan nsgan ħaiduan o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(bunuŋ). bunuŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ħaiduan o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, kanaħʦian , kanaluk , baʦiŋul , kamʦiŋ , kusunuki , ħaitutuan , takinusta , sulai-ia* , samuluħ , tuapuu , takimi , likau-uan , bulbul , *aħu , litu . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Haiduan Nsgan Haiduan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 892.99 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 817.5 km², dxgal pmblxan o 74.18 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,278, sapah o 1,090, seejiq tnpusu 4,032 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 94%(Bunung). Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Haiduan o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 15. 15 o, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu . pusupnyahan patas
